articles.title: After Hardeep Puri, now FM Sitharaman fact-checks lockdown rumours, says 'want to reassure...'
articles.description: After Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri rejected speculation of a nationwide lockdown, Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman on Friday moved to firmly dispel the rumours, assuring citizens

topStories.title: T.N. election 2026: When an ‘underdog’ MGR stunned many with his 1980 victory in Tamil Nadu
topStories.description: After President N. Sanjiva Reddy invoked Article 356 on a Sunday night in February 1980 to dismiss CMs in nine States, including Tamil Nadu’s M.G. Ramachandran, many in this State thought the victory of the Congress-DMK coalition in the Assembly poll was a given. Yet, it was the AIADMK that emerged victorious

topStories.title: Opinion: Iran May Be Far More Prepared For A 'Ground Invasion' Than Trump Thinks
topStories.description: The troops provide Trump with several options, such as invading or blockading Kharg Island, Iran's main oil export hub, or even Qeshm.

topStories.title: Will petrol, diesel prices go down after excise duty cut by govt amid Iran war? Big question answered
topStories.description: The excise duty move comes amid disruptions in energy supplies globally due to the chokehold on key waterway Strait of Hormuz because of the US-Iran war.

topStories.title: Excise cuts won't change fuel price, relief only in narrative: Congress claims
topStories.description: Pawan Khera pointed out that these companies have been absorbing losses since the outbreak of the conflict in West Asia; "The government has now merely agreed to share a small part of that burden but reducing the 'special additional' levy - that too almost a month later," the Congress leader said.

topStories.title: Opinion: Opinion: Iran War Is Now All About Future Of Hormuz
topStories.description: Trump has extended his ultimatum threatening to bomb Iran's energy infrastructure by a further 10 days.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Socrates: ‘The unexamined life is not worth living’
topStories.description: Socrates emphasised the importance of self-examination for a meaningful life. He encouraged critical thinking through dialogue and questioned societal norms, ultimately facing trial and death for his beliefs. His ideas remain relevant today, reminding us to reflect on our values and choices.

topStories.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 28 of attacks?
topStories.description: Trump has delayed attacks on Iran's energy facilities by 10 days, claiming talks are going well - though Iran disagrees.

topStories.title: PM Modi and I get things done: US embassy posts Trump's message amid Iran war
topStories.description: PM Modi and I get things done US embassy posts Trumps message amid Iran war

topStories.title: ‘PM Modi and I are two people that get things done’: Message from Donald Trump
topStories.description: The shoutout for PM Modi comes three days after he ​spoke to Trump and discussed ‌the situation in the Middle East, including the choked Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: TSA officers lose homes, can't pay medical bills, can't afford Easter baskets for their children
topStories.description: TSA officers received their third paycheck of zero dollars as the DHS shutdown continues, with stories emerging of lost homes, unpaid medical bills and ruined credit.

topStories.title: Helicopter crashes into ocean off Hawaii coast, leaving multiple dead and injured
topStories.description: Three people were killed and two others injured Thursday when a helicopter operated by Airborne Aviation crashed into the ocean off Kauai, Hawaii.

topStories.title: DHS shutdown breakthrough comes at cost for Republicans as funding fights nears end
topStories.description: The Senate advanced a DHS shutdown deal without ICE or CBP funding, as Republicans plan to use reconciliation to secure immigration enforcement funding long-term.

dailyNews.title: DHS shutdown breakthrough comes at cost for Republicans as funding fights nears end
dailyNews.description: The Senate advanced a DHS shutdown deal without ICE or CBP funding, as Republicans plan to use reconciliation to secure immigration enforcement funding long-term.

dailyNews.title: Rubio meets G7 ministers in France as US leads on Iran — allies under fire for tepid response
dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio heads into the G7 foreign ministers meeting in France saying U.S. priorities come first, as European allies push for a diplomatic solution on Iran.

dailyNews.title: New Jersey middle school teacher charged with child sex assault after alleged sexual relationship with student
dailyNews.description: A former New Jersey middle school teacher faces multiple charges after allegedly engaging in a sexual relationship with a student in 2021.

dailyNews.title: Appeals court pauses orders limiting federal agents' use of tear gas at protests near Portland ICE building
dailyNews.description: An appeals court paused two lower court rulings that limited tear gas use on protesters outside the Immigration and Customs Enforcement building in Portland.

dailyNews.title: Indiana coach Cignetti sends message to star transfer with pre-practice dress code lesson
dailyNews.description: Indiana head coach Curt Cignetti said his staff has more work to do with its transfer class, noting he called out wide receiver Nick Marsh over gold shoes prior to spring practice.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iranian protesters being ‘shot by snipers,’ voices support for people under regime
dailyNews.description: President tells "The Five" the Iranian regime uses snipers to suppress protests, drawing a distinction between Iran's leadership and its people amid Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.title: Climate executive warns California ‘functionally bankrupt,’ $1T shortfall could shake nation
dailyNews.description: Climate entrepreneur David Friedberg warned California is “functionally bankrupt," citing pension liabilities, legal limits, and spending concerns in a recent interview.

dailyNews.title: United jet dodges Black Hawk in last-second maneuver over California airport: 'That was not good'
dailyNews.description: The FAA is investigating a close call between a United Airlines Boeing 737 and a Black Hawk helicopter at John Wayne Airport in Santa Ana, California.

dailyNews.title: DHS arrests 5 illegal immigrants convicted of violent crimes including manslaughter, child assault
dailyNews.description: ICE arrested five illegal immigrants convicted of manslaughter, child sexual assault, and carjacking, according to DHS Acting Assistant Secretary Lauren Bis.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises San Francisco mayor for 'trying very hard' to improve city after moderates took over leadership
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says San Francisco has tremendous potential and claims federal tools could solve the city's crime problems faster than local leadership can.

dailyNews.title: Former Eagles star Brent Celek’s ex-wife reveals relationship with another ex-Philadelphia player
dailyNews.description: Susie Celek, ex-wife of retired Eagles tight end Brent Celek, went public on social media with her relationship with former Philadelphia player Hollis Thomas.

dailyNews.title: State Department reveals world's most dangerous countries for Americans
dailyNews.description: Americans face risks of "arbitrary arrests" and kidnapping abroad amid State Department warnings for the Middle East, Mexico and Iran-linked threats.

dailyNews.title: Doctor’s bloodied wife seen in bodycam after screaming for help from husband’s alleged attack
dailyNews.description: Bodycam footage shown at an attempted murder trial in Maui captured Arielle Konig bloodied on a trail. Prosecutors allege her doctor husband attacked her.

topStories.description: President Trump’s announcement came as talks on Capitol Hill over funding the Department of Homeland Security faltered, and airport lines continued to grow.

topStories.title: Trump’s Signature Is Set to Be Added to America’s Currency
topStories.description: President Trump is poised to be the first sitting president to have his signature appear on the U.S. dollar.

topStories.title: Trump Officials Investigate Stanford, Ohio State and U.C. San Diego Medical Schools
topStories.description: The Justice Department’s demands for admissions-related data from Stanford, Ohio State and the University of California, San Diego, reveal an expansion of its higher-education pressure campaign.

topStories.title: What’s on Trump’s Mind During a Cabinet Meeting? Sharpies, Iran and Inflation.
topStories.description: President Trump waxed on about the virtues of the pen, calling it more economical and a better instrument than the fancier writing tools preferred by his predecessors.

dailyNews.title: Standoff With Iran Raises Fresh Doubts About Trump’s Freestyle Diplomacy
dailyNews.description: A jumble of emissaries — a friend, a family member, a dove and a hawk — on the Iran crisis reflects President Trump’s improvisational approach.

dailyNews.title: Oil Prices Continue to Climb After Trump Delays Bombing Threat
dailyNews.description: President Trump said on Thursday he would delay an imminent deadline to begin attacking Iran’s power grid.

dailyNews.title: Kennedy’s Vaccine Agenda Hits Roadblocks, Diminishing His Clout
dailyNews.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s vaccine skepticism is posing challenges for the Trump administration. Top health jobs are unfilled, and a court has blocked his vaccine schedule changes.

dailyNews.title: Trump Defends His Use of Mail-In Voting: ‘Because I’m President’
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to restrict voting by mail, which he says amounts to “cheating.” But he defended his own use of the practice in a special election this week.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he'll order DHS to start paying TSA officers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he will sign an executive order to restart pay for TSA officers, who have gone more than a month without a full paycheck.

dailyNews.title: Senate approves most DHS funding, hours after Trump promised to restart TSA pay
dailyNews.description: The Senate agreed early Friday to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security in an effort to end a standoff in Congress that led to massive lines at many airports.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's 2026 State of the Union Address and the Democratic response
dailyNews.description: President Trump delivers the longest State of the Union address in recent history, followed by the Democratic response from Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff floats Iran peace plan as Trump extends pause on energy plant strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump has extended a pause on striking Iranian energy infrastructure until April 6.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Pentagon from labeling Anthropic AI a "supply chain risk"
dailyNews.description: A judge has blocked the Trump administration from labeling Anthropic a supply chain risk and cutting off all federal work with the artificial intelligence firm, an early win for Anthropic in its bitter feud with the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's granting Iran's request to extend pause on energy site strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced the extension of the pause "per Iranian government request."

dailyNews.title: Trump extends pause on Iran energy sites, claims Iranians eager for peace deal
dailyNews.description: The U.S. will extend its pause on strikes on Iranian energy plants by roughly an additional 10 days, at the request of the Iranian government, President Trump announced. Ed O'Keefe has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he will sign order to pay TSA workers following weeks of long lines
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted on Truth Social that he is signing an order to pay TSA workers. They have been working without pay for 41 days during the partial shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security. Roughly 11% of officers are calling out daily, leading to long TSA lines at airports. NBC News’ Tom Costello reports.
